vocab.meaning: dấu tích của một thời đã qua
vocab.example: To me, an analog watch is a charming vestige of a bygone era that still holds immense practical value.

vocab.meaning: tương tác xúc giác (chạm, cảm nhận bằng tay)
vocab.example: I appreciate the tactile interaction of adjusting the crown on a mechanical watch compared to tapping a digital screen.

vocab.meaning: việc sử dụng thời gian một cách tỉnh thức
vocab.example: Wearing a watch encourages a more mindful consumption of time, as it keeps you grounded in the present moment.
In high-level negotiations, glancing at a wrist-worn timepiece is often seen as a matter of professional etiquette.

vocab.meaning: cảm thức/hoài niệm về đồ vật truyền thống (không kỹ thuật số)
vocab.example: I maintain an analog sentiment in this digital age, which is why I never leave home without my leather-strap watch.
A discreet glance at my wrist allows me to check the duration of a lecture without appearing disrespectful to the speaker.

vocab.meaning: khả năng trở thành vật gia bảo
vocab.example: I prefer high-quality mechanical watches because they possess heirloom potential and can be passed down through generations.
Having a watch constantly visible on my wrist significantly sharpens my temporal awareness during a busy workday.

vocab.meaning: sự đơn giản nhưng hiệu quả về công năng
vocab.example: I am drawn to the functional simplicity of a field watch, which does exactly what it needs to without unnecessary complications.

vocab.meaning: giữ cho thói quen hàng ngày đi đúng quỹ đạo
vocab.example: My watch helps anchor my daily routine, providing a reliable reference point from morning to night.
